title: 宝塚記念の後に・Weave a Story

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion revels in the Takarazuka Kinen, and
her performance stirs the hearts of everyone
watching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy compares Fine Motion to the
main character of a story. She realizes that as
long as her story continues in everyone's hearts,
she has nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion decides that her next race will be the
Sapporo Kinen. And I know that a certain other
notable Umamusume is going to be running there
as well!
